string-array.name: answer_arr
string-array.item: Ohere Egwuregwu/XArena nke arụnyere n’ime Xunyou Egwuregwu Turbo bụ ngwahịa arụrụ kpọmkwem maka TECNO/Infinix iji mezie ọkwụkwụ netwọk egwuregwu. O nwere ike imezi nsogbu nke oke latensi, mwepụ njikọ, wdg. ma mee ka netwọk na-aga ọfụma ma egwuregwu akwụdosi ike. Ọ na-akwado Wi-Fi na netwọk data ndị ọzọ (5G/4G/3G).
Egwuregwu turbo na-akwado ọtụtụ egwuregwu. Ọ bụrụ na e nweghi ike ịkwalite ụfọdụ egwuregwu, ị nwere ike ịkpọtụrụ ọrụ nlekọta onye ahịa n’ikuku maka nkwado.
TECNO/Infinix ID bụ akaụntụ onye ọgbụgba na-ejikwa ọrụ Xunyou Egwuregwu Turbo N’ime Ohere Egwuregwu/XArena. Akaụntụ niile nwere ike ịnweta ihe nrite ndị nwere isi ma kwalite ọrụ ka abanyesịrị.
1. Kwadogharịa iji lelee netwọk ịkwụ ụgwọ. 2. Lelee ma ihe họrọ na akaụntụ ịkwụ ụgwọ ahụ ga-ezu ịkwado ịkwụ ụgwọ ahụ.
"Biko kpatụ aka na ọgbara njikọ dị n'okpuru iji gụọ %1$s na %2$s."

string-array.name: question_arr
string-array.item: Kedu egwuregwu ndị egwuregwu turbo na-akwado?
Kedu akaụntụ nọ n’okpuru egwuregwu turbo?
Etu esi emezi nsogbu ịkwụ ụgwọ?
Ebe a ga-agụ Iwu Nzuzo na Nkwekọrịta Onye Ojiji?
